text:
Great question! For Vercel, you have two main options to serve `llms.txt`:

## Option A: Static File (Simplest)
Place the generated `llms.txt` file in your Vercel project's `/public` directory. Vercel will automatically serve it at `https://example.vercel.app/llms.txt`.

## Option B: Proxy Route (Recommended)
If you prefer automatic updates when you re-run audits, set up a proxy in your Next.js application to redirect requests to our servers:
- `/llms.txt` → `https://geo.flowblinq.com/api/serve/{your-slug}/llms.txt`
- `/llms-full.txt` → `https://geo.flowblinq.com/api/serve/{your-slug}/llms-full.txt`  
- `/.well-known/ucp.json` → `https://geo.flowblinq.com/api/serve/{your-slug}/business.json` [1]

---

**👉 Your Setup tab should have generated the exact files and code for your domain.** Download them there and follow the instructions — they're customized for Vercel.

If you hit any snags with the implementation, reach out to **hello@flowblinq.ai** and we'll help you get it deployed! 🚀
